zh.lifeSummary: Marion Thornborough是Sir John Thornborough的女兒，於大約1341年出生在英國。她於1370年之前與William Greville結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年9月10日在英國格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登享年46歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marion Thornborough是Sir John Thornborough的女儿，于大约1341年出生在英国。她于1370年之前与William Greville结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年9月10日在英国格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登享年46岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登。

nameMeanings.name: Thornborough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of various places, including Thornborough in Allerton Mauleverer (WR Yorks), Thornbrough in South Kilvington (NR Yorks), Thornbrough in Corbridge (Northumb), and Thornborough (Bucks).  See also  Thornbury   and   Thornber  .
2  Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’;  compare  Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornbury
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornberry
meanings: English (southwestern): habitational name from any of various places called Thornbury, in particular Thornbury (Gloucestershire), Thornbury (Herefordshire), or perhaps Thornbury (Devon), or Thornbury in Bradford (Yorkshire). These placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + burg ‘fortress’ or ‘manor’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornburgh
meanings: English (Worcestershire) and Irish: variant of   Thornbury  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Marion Thornborough was born about 1341, in England as the daughter of Sir John Thornborough. She married William Greville before 1370. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 September 1386, in Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Marion Thornborough est née environ 1341, à Angleterre, fille de Sir John Thornborough. Elle a épousé William Greville avant 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1386, à Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Marion Thornborough wurde um 1341 in England, als Tochter von Sir John Thornborough geboren. Sie hat vor 1370 William Greville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. September 1386 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Thornboroughは約1341年にイギリスでSir John Thornboroughの娘として生まれた。1370年以前にWilliam Grevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年9月10日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング カンプデンで46歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング カンプデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Thornborough(은)는 대략 1341년 영국에서 Sir John Thornborough의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1370년 이전 William Greville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 9월 10일 영국 그루스스터실르 치핀그 캠p든에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 치핀그 캠p든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marion Thornborough nasceu aproximadamente 1341, em Inglaterra filha de Sir John Thornborough. Ela casou-se com William Greville antes 1370. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1386, em Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Marion Thornborough родилась около 1341 г. в местности Англия. Её отца звали Sir John Thornborough. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Greville перед 1370 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 сентября 1386 г. в местности чиппинг кампден, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности чиппинг кампден, глоусестиршир, Англия.
